channel.title: AI Tutorials Pro
channel.description: Master AI tools and make money with artificial intelligence

item.title: Best AI Video Generators in 2026: 8 Tools Compared
item.description: Sora 2 vs Veo 3 vs Runway vs Kling vs Pika — complete comparison with pricing, quality, and best-for verdicts.

item.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Assistant Wins in 2026?
item.description: Real-world comparison of the top AI assistants across coding, writing, analysis, and reasoning.

item.title: Midjourney Tutorial: From Beginner to Pro in 30 Minutes
item.description: Complete walkthrough from your first prompt to advanced techniques including style references and consistent characters.

item.title: Claude 4 vs GPT-5: The Ultimate Coding Benchmarks
item.description: Benchmark the latest Claude 4 Opus and GPT-5 on real coding challenges — algorithms, debugging, full-stack apps.

item.title: AI Prompt Engineering: The Complete Guide for 2026
item.description: Master prompt engineering from basic techniques to advanced frameworks like chain-of-thought and prompt chaining.

item.title: How to Make Money with AI in 2026: 7 Proven Strategies
item.description: Seven real ways people are generating income with AI tools right now.

item.title: 10 Best AI Tools for Content Creation in 2026 (Tested)
item.description: Top 10 tools that actually deliver results for blog posts, videos, social media, and marketing content.
